basic_details.job_title: NEEPCO Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 38 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO)
basic_details.short_information: NEEPCO Recruitment 2026 – Executive Notification 2026 has been released on the official website North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO) North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited. A total of 38 vacancies have been announced through the NEEPCO Executive Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max Age: 37 years as on 01-01-2026, Max Age: 34 years as on 01-01-2026, Max Age: 30 years as on 01-01-2026, Max Age: 31 years as on 01-01-2026
age_limit.details: Executive (ERP): Maximum Age 37 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (HR) (Corporate Communication): Maximum Age 37 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Civil): Maximum Age 37 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Civil): Maximum Age 34 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Civil): Maximum Age 30 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Security): Maximum Age 34 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Law): Maximum Age 34 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Safety): Maximum Age 34 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Finance): Maximum Age 34 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Finance): Maximum Age 30 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (Medical): Maximum Age 31 years as on 01-01-2026. Executive (HR) (CSR): Maximum Age 30 years as on 01-01-2026. Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC-NCL - 3 years, PwBD - 10 years, Ex-Serviceman - As per Govt. guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline, Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering, MBBS, Master's Degree in Social Work, CA/CMA or MBA or equivalent with specialization in Finance, PG Degree / Diploma in Mass Communication / Journalism, Bachelor's Degree in Law, Engineering Degree in Mechanical/Electrical/ Production with Diploma in Industrial Safety or Engineering Degree in Industrial Safety/ Fire & Safety.
qualification.details: Executive (ERP): Full-time Bachelor in Engineering / Bachelor in Technology / BSc. Engineering (in any field) from a recognized University. SAP certification in HCM module is mandatory. Minimum 7 years of post-qualification experience in SAP ERP HCM module implementation/support/rollout. Executive (HR) (Corporate Communication): Graduate with PG Degree / Diploma in Mass Communication / Journalism (2 yrs full time course) recognized by Government of India. Minimum 7 years of experience in managing public relations/corporate communication, media planning, press relations, and content creation. Executive (Civil): Full time Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/ Institute of India. For one post, 7 years of post-qualification experience in planning/survey & investigation/civil construction works of Hydropower project/PSP. For another post, 4 years of post-qualification experience in Hydropower project/PSP. For the third post, Bachelor's degree holders need 1 year of experience, and Diploma holders need 5 years of experience in Survey & Investigation works of hydro power project/PSP. Executive (Security): Graduate in any discipline, recognized by Govt. of India. Minimum 9 years of experience in Armed Forces in the rank of Captain / Major / Lieutenant Colonel or equivalent in Central/ State Police Organizations. Executive (Law): Bachelor's Degree in Law (LLB or equivalent-full time degree from recognized Indian University/ Institute) with 6 years of practice in Court of Law as Advocate or Judicial Service or in CPSU/ represent the PSU in the Court of Law or 9 years experience in the next below grade in CPSU/ GOI/ State Govt. Executive (Safety): Engineering Degree in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Production from a recognized University/Institution with a full-time Diploma in Industrial Safety or Engineering Degree in Industrial Safety/ Fire & Safety from a University/Institution recognized under the Factories Act/Rules. Minimum 04 years working experience in compliance with safety regulations under the Factories Act. Executive (Finance): Graduate with CA/CMA or MBA or equivalent with specialization in Finance of at least two years duration recognized by GOI. Minimum 4 years of experience for one post. No specific experience mentioned for the other post. Executive (Medical): MBBS preferably with Post graduate Degree / Diploma in one of areas of Medical Science (+) Registered with the Indian Medical Council. Preferable 1 year of experience in large industry / reputed Hospital after completion of Internship. Executive (HR) (CSR): A Master's Degree in Social Work, Community Organisation and Development Practice, recognized by GOI. 1 year experience in CSR/ Social Welfare works or experience of working in ERP Environment.

selection_process: Application shortlisting/screening (based on qualification/percentage of marks
etc.) Written/computer-based test Personal interview Multi-stage selection process
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NEEPCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEEPCO Executive posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NEEPCO Executive posts is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Executive posts in NEEPCO?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies announced for various Executive posts in North Eastern Electric Power Corporation Limited (NEEPCO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for NEEPCO Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post, ranging from a Graduate degree in any discipline to specialized degrees like Engineering, MBBS, CA/CMA, MBA, and Law.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to NEEPCO Executive posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post, with the highest being 37 years as of 01-01-2026 for some positions, and lower limits for others.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NEEPCO Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for General/EWS/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-. No fee is mentioned for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NEEPCO Executive posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves application shortlisting, followed by a written/computer-based test, and a personal interview, forming a multi-stage selection process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for NEEPCO Executive posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly compensation varies significantly by post, ranging from Rs. 71,000/- to Rs. 1,66,000/-.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from any part of India apply for NEEPCO jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, the job location is listed as 'Across India', indicating that candidates from all over India are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job in NEEPCO?
faq.answer: The NEEPCO Executive posts are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article, along with a link to the official NEEPCO website.
